actions.name: add_sheet
actions.description: Add a new sheet through spreadsheets.batchUpdate and return stable batch replies.

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID or spreadsheet URL.

includeSpreadsheetInResponse.description: Whether to include the updated spreadsheet in the response.

responseRanges.description: Ranges to include in the response spreadsheet.

responseIncludeGridData.description: Whether response spreadsheet data should include grid data.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

anyOf.description: String value, or null when Google did not return it.

searchValue.description: Value matched in the search column.

hasHeaderRow.description: Whether the first row contains headers.
